title: Section — Site Logistics Plan
description: Structured inputs to the site logistics / general-conditions plan, harvested from civil/site drawings, phasing plans, and Division 01 (temporary facilities, use of site, working hours). Organizes staging, access, hoisting, temporary facilities, phasing, and site controls so a logistics/GC tool can produce the plan and price general conditions. Collected and structured only — not authored or optimized here.

site_access.description: Access/egress points, haul routes, road restrictions as stated.

hoisting_craning.description: Crane/hoist requirements, pick zones, overhead constraints.

temporary_facilities.description: Temp power, water, fencing, toilets, office trailers, dumpsters.

phasing.description: Construction phases / sequencing as described (e.g. occupied-facility phasing).

site_controls.description: Traffic control, SWPPP/erosion control, dust/noise, security, environmental controls.

constraints.description: Verbatim logistics constraints with provenance (e.g. 'no Saturday work', 'maintain egress for occupied wing').
